aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and structured data to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks/services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Santa Monica' and 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common customer questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed project case studies to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top recommendation for HVAC queries in Santa Monica.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content are consistently cited by AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, FAQ content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Your Path to HVAC Leads in Santa Monica
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence and attract more HVAC leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
